TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Atayal, story: AtaNr-hunting3_Takun

S.FORM: ulaqi kung sunga' ru rasun kuing ni yava' mu musa' i ragiyax musa' i sumku' su trap.
S.TRANSL: 以前我還是小孩的時候，我爸爸帶我去山上為了設置陷阱。
When I was a little child, my father brought me, and went to the mountain, and set

S.FORM: tuliq ru makatu ru makaspat ga halan mian i mitaal hani vay taruyqun ku qutux ku vauwak.
S.TRANSL: 然後，隔了三到四天我們去看，正吊到一隻山豬。
And then, three or four days later, we went to see (the trap), and it was taking place that a hog was hung.

S.FORM: havaw ta' maha sami.
S.TRANSL: 我們說我們來刺。
We said that we came stabbing (it).

S.FORM: havun niam ru maisu kung gi ulaqi kuing rumakiyas kuing gi kaisun mu ima kasau nia maha kuing.
S.TRANSL: 我們刺了以後，我會害怕，因為我還是小孩，我爬樹因為我害怕，怕它過來咬我。
We stabbed (it) and, because I was afraid as a kid, I climbed up a tree because I was afraid that it would come and bite me, I thought.

S.FORM: rarima nia i aruwa havun su awlu la ru.
S.TRANSL: 先前他已經刺了山豬喉嚨。
He had already stabbed the hog into its throat.

S.FORM: tuliq ru tutingun nia su tunux ru mwah sami la.
S.TRANSL: 然後，爸爸他打了山豬的頭，然後我們就回來了。
And then, Father beat the hog on the head, and we came back.

S.FORM: panga nia' sipapanga' nia kuing ru ini' mu papruyqi.
S.TRANSL: 他叫我去揹，但是我揹不動。
He asked me to carry it on the back, but I just couldn't.

S.FORM: muah sami ru maki sami kaykian havag ku vais nia' pakati' nia' suku qaqalapan naha.
S.TRANSL: 我們回來，然後我們在獵寮。(爸爸)他的同伴都把獵物丟到睡覺的地方（來炫耀）。
We came back, and we were at the hunting hut. All his fellow companions threw (the preys) to the place for rest (to show off).

S.FORM: apau aku su uw taruiqun la ku ra huwal san naha ku.
S.TRANSL: 他們說，哇，原來你吊到很大的東西。
Wow, indeed you hung something big big, they said.

S.FORM: gulgulu nia maqas kahavag la.
S.TRANSL: 他的同伴都很高興。
All his fellow companions were glad.

S.FORM: sihaw naha' sumayuk ku ruma'.
S.TRANSL: 他們倒酒給他後就燒山豬毛。
They poured the liquor to him (the hog hunter), and they burned its hair.

S.FORM: naqarun sumayuk hauvingun naha'.
S.TRANSL: 燒完毛後，他們就切山豬。
After burning off the hair of the hog, they cut it.

S.FORM: tiku hi ga siaras i suku ulaqi imuwag.
S.TRANSL: 肉要帶給家裡面的小孩。
The meat was intended to be taken to the children at home.

S.FORM: tiku giyus la ga tahkun kiya i ragiyax la ru.
S.TRANSL: 內臟的部分就在山上煮。
The internal organs were cooked in the mountains.

S.FORM: maniq sami su mami' la ru manuvuwag su quwaw ru maymaw pana'is ku nanavakis gi paqasun naha' la.
S.TRANSL: 我們吃飯然後喝酒，然後老人們高興得開始唱歌，因為真的很開心。
We ate and then we drank the liquor, and the elders were so happy that they began to sing because they were really happy.

S.FORM: muwah sami imuwag ru.
S.TRANSL: 我們回到家。
We came home.

S.FORM: muwah i mapatisan imuwag makaal maha mausa' ta' i kanuwan ma ru.
S.TRANSL: 我們回到家裡後相互聊天，討論說什麼時候要去。
We came back and chatted with each other at home, discussing when would be the next visit.

S.FORM: sumku su riax su ausa' naha' mitaal lawwi.
S.TRANSL: 訂下日子下次再去巡陷阱。
(We) settled on the date and would check the trap again.

S.FORM: tuliq ru maka mapitu' ru halan naha' mitaal lawwi.
S.TRANSL: 然後，過了七天後他們又去看陷阱。
And then, seven days later, they went to check the trap again.

S.FORM: musa' sami lawwi ru gumru kung lawwi i yava' mu.
S.TRANSL: 我們又去一次，然後我又跟著爸爸去一次。
We went there again, and I followed Father there again.

S.FORM: tayhuk sami kiya qaat yani la ku tinruyqan taruyqun nia la hani tinruweq su para'.
S.TRANSL: 我們到那邊(獵場)，在新的地方又吊到東西，就在這邊吊到山羌。
We arrived there (the hunting area), and we had something hung at a new place, and it was one muntjac.

S.FORM: alun alun miam ku para' ru.
S.TRANSL: 我們就把山羌拿走。
We took away the muntjac.

S.FORM: tutingun niam ru alun niam.
S.TRANSL: 我們打了(山羌)之後，我們就把它拿走了。
We beat (the munjtac) and we took it away.

S.FORM: ru qutux suvalay ku para' miam.
S.TRANSL: 我們只有獵到一隻山羌。
What we hunted was only one muntjac.

S.FORM: siqun sami kaykian kahavag ku minaglu saspat.
S.TRANSL: 四個人一起隨後在獵竂集合。
All the four of us gathered at the hunting hut.

S.FORM: tuliq ru sayukan naha' nanu' asi naku manaaling musa' ka.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們燒毛就像他們當初去打獵的樣子。
And then, they burned its hair just like when they went hunting.

S.FORM: sinuvuwag naha' ru.
S.TRANSL: 他們就為此喝酒。
They drank for this.

S.FORM: maqas ku inlungan naha'.
S.TRANSL: 他們心裡很開心。
They were happy at heart.

S.FORM: gi muwani ku navakis sunga' i maqas inluangan ga ga manuvuwag tikay su quwaw ru manaqru' manuvuwag la ga mapanaquwas la panaquwas la ru kinsasan maqilap la ru kinsasan nia' la ga sugagay sami la ru.
S.TRANSL: 因為以前老人就是這樣，如果心裡高興的話，就會喝一點酒。喝完了酒，就會一直唱歌和睡覺直到第二天來臨，然後我們就分開。

The reason is that, in the past, the elders were like this. If they were happy at heart, they drank a little liquor. After that, (they) would keep singing and sleep until the next day. We did not part until the following day.

S.FORM: paqusan mu i naka'ava' mu maha u suwa' ka raramat nanak ku.
S.TRANSL: 我就問死去的爸爸說，為什麼只有菜而已。
I asked my late father why there was only meat to eat.

S.FORM: han ta' kumiyum ukas tiqay a vuwax san la.
S.TRANSL: 我們去找一找之後，(對爸爸)說為什麼沒有米。
We went searching, and I asked: “Why was there no rice?”

S.FORM: ku nanavakis sunga' ru atu' na valayq valay ku qinqiyanux naku nanavakis sunga'.
S.TRANSL: 以前老人們的生活真的很好。
In the past the life of the elderly were really nice.

S.FORM: ana i ukas a luwan naku navakis sunga' ga ana tiqay ku luwan naha' ga paqasun naha' suvalay ukas ku ku inluangan naha' ka makis suku inluangan naha' maha u nanuwan ku si'anakux ta'.
S.TRANSL: 就算沒有收穫東西很少，他們也很開心。他們心裡在不覺得說有什麼要擔心的。
Though they had no gains, they were still happy. At their heart, they did not think that they had things to worry about.

S.FORM: maniq ku navakis hiya' la ga paqasun naha' vali asi naku citay hani ka payux a vavayqan su pila' ru.
S.TRANSL: 老人家有得吃的話，他們就很開心，也不會像這個時代一樣，有很多東西要給錢。
If the elders had things to eat, they were happy. It was not like this era when many things demand money.

S.FORM: payux usalan na pila' ru.
S.TRANSL: 錢的去處很多。
There are many places where money can be spent.

S.FORM: savak maqiyanux i.
S.TRANSL: 生活負擔很重。
The burden of life is heavy.

S.FORM: kumiyum payux ku si'anakux uwi paviru' ku ruma' ru anananuwan ga vayqan ru.
S.TRANSL: 我們找錢(賺錢)也擔心很多事，像讀書或是其他的事，不管什麼東西都要錢。
(We) search (for money) and also worry a lot as well, like study or something else, and no matter what we need we have to pay.

S.FORM: sipanaspung mu kinqyanux naku citay sunga' kinku hani ga valayq tiqay ku kinqayanux naku navakis sunga' hiya' bijiawtancun ku kinqiyanux naku navakis sunga' ru.
S.TRANSL: 我比較以前和現在的生活，以前老人的生活比較好一點，因為以前老人的生活比較單純。
I compare the past era with the present, and I think that the elderly had life a little better (than now) in the past, because their life was simple.

S.FORM: nanu' asigi ini' ta' ungiyi ku gaga' naku nanavakis sunga' maha ku inlungan mu.
S.TRANSL: 我的心裡覺得，我們不該忘記以前老人們的規矩。
I felt at heart that we should not forget the rule of the elderly.

S.FORM: a siesie.
S.TRANSL: 謝謝。
Thanks.
